events.observation: The left castle is struck by projectiles and its health decreases.
events.gameplay_meaning: The player's base is taking damage from an enemy attack.

events.observation: A hand cursor drags a red character to aim and fire it at the right castle, causing damage.
events.gameplay_meaning: The player is executing an attack by launching a character as a projectile.

events.observation: The left castle is hit by more projectiles, further reducing its health.
events.gameplay_meaning: The enemy is counter-attacking the player's base.

events.observation: A hand cursor aims and fires a skeleton character, which launches a barrage of rockets at the right castle.
events.gameplay_meaning: The player uses a different unit type to perform a multi-projectile attack.

events.observation: The left castle is hit again by incoming projectiles.
events.gameplay_meaning: The player's base continues to take damage from enemy fire.

events.observation: A hand cursor aims and fires a goblin character, shooting a green projectile at the right castle.
events.gameplay_meaning: The player deploys a third type of unit for an attack.

events.observation: The left castle sustains another hit, dropping its health significantly.
events.gameplay_meaning: The player's base is nearing destruction due to enemy attacks.

events.observation: The skeleton character is aimed upwards and fired, causing rockets to rain down on the right castle.
events.gameplay_meaning: The player utilizes an arcing attack trajectory to hit the enemy base.

events.observation: The game's title screen, 'Castle Clashers', is displayed with a 'Play' button.
events.gameplay_meaning: The gameplay sequence concludes, showing the promotional end screen.

controls.name: aim_and_shoot
controls.result: Displays a trajectory line while dragging from a unit, and fires the unit's specific projectile(s) upon release.

mechanics.name: Castle Health System
mechanics.description: Both the player's and the enemy's castles have a health percentage displayed at the top of the screen. Taking damage from projectiles reduces this health.

mechanics.name: Destructible Environments
mechanics.description: The castles visually break apart, losing blocks and sections as they take damage from attacks.

mechanics.name: Unique Unit Attacks
mechanics.description: Different units possess unique attack types. For example, the red unit fires a single rocket, the skeleton fires a barrage of smaller rockets, and the green goblin fires an explosive projectile.

mechanics.name: Enemy Auto-Attack
mechanics.description: The enemy castle automatically fires projectiles at the player's castle at regular intervals.

mechanics.name: Unit Death
mechanics.description: Units inside the castles can be destroyed by incoming fire, leaving behind a tombstone.

mechanics.win_condition: Reduce the enemy (red) castle's health to 0%.
mechanics.loss_condition: The player's (blue) castle's health is reduced to 0%.

hud.purpose: Show the remaining health percentage of each player's castle
Indicates the versus nature of the game
Allows the player to select which unit to use for the next attack

screens.name: gameplay
screens.description: The main battle phase where players take turns attacking each other's castles.

screens.name: end
screens.description: The final screen displaying the game title and a call to action.
